productName: Fireline Live Hash Rosin - Pearl Scout Cookies (H) - 01g
description: This hybrid rosin is the connoisseur's clean dab: Pearl Scout Cookies coaxed into honey-gold oil by heat and pressure alone, with nothing washed out and nothing added in. Expect with notes of citrus, skunk, and lemon, a rich terpene punch, and a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
